/usr/lib/ccache/cc -std=c89 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/ast/ast_tool.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/lex.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/pp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/parse.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/type.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/ext_builtins.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/ext_attrs.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/ext_asm.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/c99.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/c11.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/c23.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/diag.c.o" "CMakeFiles/free-ast.dir/src/cc/util.c.o" -o free-ast
